name: Gingered Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and trim the carrots, then cut into 1-inch chunks. Simmer or nuke until very tender.
2. Sauté onions in a pot until soft. Add garlic, ginger, salt, and spices. Turn heat to low and continue sautéing for another 8-10 minutes until everything is soft. Stir in lemon juice.
3. Use a food processor or blender to puree the mixture. Transfer the puree to a kettle and gently heat just before serving. Serve with a spoonful of yogurt on top if desired.
